title: Mid-Level Investment Banker at Paytm Money Capital India

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Investment Banker at Paytm Money Capital India
jsonLd.description:
We at Paytm Money Capital India are looking for an experienced Investment Banker based out of Chandigarh. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Paytm Money Capital India:
Paytm Money Capital India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in Risk Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Learning & development budget
• Referral bonus program
• Life and accident insurance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Chandigarh, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Paytm Money Capital India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
